name: Unturned
author: ops@refx.example
description: Blocky zombie-survival sandbox. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server driven by a Commands.dat config.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 1110390 validate +quit
chmod +x ServerHelper.sh || true
# Seed Unturned's Commands.dat from panel vars (server selects config by name "refx").
mkdir -p /mnt/server/Servers/refx/Server
CMD=/mnt/server/Servers/refx/Server/Commands.dat
if [ ! -f "$CMD" ]; then
  {
    echo "Name ${SERVER_NAME}"
    echo "MaxPlayers ${MAX_PLAYERS}"
    echo "Map ${MAP}"
    echo "Perspective ${PERSPECTIVE}"
    [ -n "${SERVER_PASSWORD}" ] && echo "Password ${SERVER_PASSWORD}"
  } > "$CMD"
fi
echo 'Unturned install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
Map to load (e.g. PEI, Washington, Russia, Germany).
Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: Survive the zombie apocalypse with friends on a dedicated Unturned server with full map and perspective control.
